title: Create: Cataclysm
description: Empower your "Create" factory by beating "Cataclysm" bosses
body:
# Create: Cataclysm

An addon for Create and L_Ender's Cataclysm that adds useful recipes and items.

## Current features

*   Sandstorm in a bottle can be used to craft unbreakable sand paper.
*   Lava power cell contains a huge amount of lava. (Put it into a item drain to get lava)
*   Craft blaze cake and ignitium ingot in mechanical fusion anvil to get creative blaze cake.
*   Mix all the ingots in Cataclysm to get cataclysmic alloy that can be used to craft creative motor.
